features: An Eau de Toilette for him
Package dimensions: 3.0 L x 16.0 H x 9.6 W (cm)
description: Product Description Police Sport Eau de Toilette for men will help you reveal the masculinity, strength, and courage hidden deep inside you. This fragrance is brimming with manly power and will perfectly enhance your character every step you take. Ingredients Alcohol, Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Benzyl Salicylate, Hydroxycitronellal, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Linalool, Ethylhexyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Coumarin, Alpha-isomethyl Ionone, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Eugenol, Limonene, Citral, Farnesol, Isoeugenol, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Alcohol, Ci 14700 (Red 4), Ci 60730 (Ext. Violet 2), Ci 19140 (Yellow 5). Directions When applying perfume, do not rub it. Store perfume in a cool place. Apply those areas of the body where pulse beats: wrists, collarbones, behind ears, or back elbow. Do not perfume clothes to avoid irreparable stains this one. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse with water thoroughly. See more
